examples: "No," said Snowdrop, "I dare not take it."
Snowdrop said, "I dare not let anyone in."
Snowdrop looked out at the window, and said, "Good day, good woman!"
Snowdrop Valley on Exmoor has opened to the public, one week later than usual.
Snowdrop Valley is a privately owned valley in Wheddon Cross near Minehead.
